name: Navigate to a product detail page
scenarioId: product_detail:Navigate to a product detail page
methodName: Navigate to a product detail page

testSteps.description: Given the shopper is on the homepage with products loaded

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: When the shopper clicks the first product card
Then the URL should match the product detail pattern
And the product title should be visible on the detail page

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to view detailed product information
  So that I can make an informed purchase decision

title: Navigate to a product detail page
